{%- if current_version %}
Other Versions v: {{ current_version.name.replace('.0', '') }}
{%- if versions.tags %}
Tags
{%- set sorted_tags = versions.tags | sort(attribute='name', reverse=true) %} {%- for item in sorted_tags %} {%- set clean_name = item.name.replace('.0', '') %}
{{ clean_name }}{% if loop.first %} (Latest){% endif %}
{%- endfor %}
{%- endif %} {%- if versions.branches %}
Branches
{%- for item in versions.branches %}
{{ item.name }}
{%- endfor %}
{%- endif %}
{%- if versions.tags and versions.tags|length > 1 %} {%- set sorted_tags = versions.tags | sort(attribute='name', reverse=true) %} {%- set latest_version = sorted_tags[0] %} {%- set current_clean = current_version.name.replace('.0', '') %} {%- set latest_clean = latest_version.name.replace('.0', '') %} {%- if current_clean != latest_clean %}

📋 You're viewing older documentation

This is documentation for {{ current_clean }}. Click here for the latest version ({{ latest_clean }})

{%- endif %} {%- endif %} {%- endif %}
